response.original_title: Can I Dispute a Priceline Charge? {Full Guide @}
response.overview: Yes absolutely, a Priceline transaction Toll-Free Help: +1【888】⇄423⇄4029 or UK: +44【203】⇄836⇄5747  (OTA) can be disputed if there is a billing error or fraud. Toll-Free Help: +1【888】⇄423⇄4029 or UK: +44【203】⇄836⇄5747 (OTA)  Always try resolving it with Priceline first, then contact your bank with proof if needed.
response.title: Can I Dispute a Priceline Charge? {Full Guide @}
